params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a charge counter on CARDNAME. Then if there are four or more charge counters on it, you may remove those counters and transform it.

params.Description: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. When that mana is spent to cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add one mana of any color. When that mana is spent to cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.
